title: Retro Collection: 3 in 1
desc: Three timeless classics. Endless retro fun.

title: Block Run
desc: BLOCK RUN is a fast, minimalist grid-based dodge game where you play as a single square racing to the far side of the arena across 10 quick levels. Each stage is a short, high-pressure run on a live grid. Enemy blocks move left and right in predictable “ping-pong” paths, with some resetting automatically, pushing you to judge timing, bait openings, and slip through at the exact moment; no extra assets, no distractions—just pure top-down arcade precision and rapid retries.

title: The Frog’s Adventure
desc:
He is not a handsome frog, but he wears overalls, boots, and is very likeable.
A superhero nobody asked for.
